name: @membase/cursor
description: Membase plugin for Cursor — persistent memory with session hooks and MCP

scripts.build: bun build ./src/cli.ts --outfile ./dist/cli.js --target node && bun build ./src/mcp-server.ts --outfile ./dist/mcp-server.js --target node && bun build ./src/hooks/session-start.ts --outfile ./dist/session-start.js --target node && bun build ./src/hooks/session-end.ts --outfile ./dist/session-end.js --target node && node scripts/add-cli-shebang.mjs
